title: 夢想在草地間
lyrics_text:
[verse]
草地綠意盎然，風吹過草葉聲

夢想在身邊，追逐著光亮
[chorus]
追尋着夢想的路，不畏風雨
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Line 3 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 5.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 7.", "Section [verse] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 1 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 1 lyric lines; expected 4."]
quality_suggestions: ["聲調：避免連續相同聲調，注意每行第二、四字的平仄交替。", "押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。", "連貫性：加入重複副歌段落以強化整體結構感。"]
